id.description: A unique integer value identifying this dashboard.

output_format.description: 'optimized' (default) returns LLM-friendly formatted text per insight. 'json' returns the raw query result objects.

refresh.description: Cache behavior. 'force_cache' (default) serves from cache even if stale. 'blocking' uses cache if fresh, otherwise recalculates. 'force_blocking' always recalculates.
